title: Amravati Sex Scandal Deepens: 350 Videos, Over 100 Viral Clips Surface; 19-Year-Old Arrested
description: Amravati shocking video scandal widens as police arrest a second accused for downloading and circulating explicit clips from the main accused’s phone. Over 350 videos are under scrutiny with links to nearly 180 suspected victims, as cyber teams recover deleted data and demands for an SIT probe intensify.
